positive: Minimalist abstract depiction of a soaring phoenix silhouette rising from stylized, geometric liquid waves, using a palette of deep sapphire blue, burnished copper, and ethereal gold accents. The style must be a fusion of Art Deco poster art and modern graphic linework, with high contrast and a crisp, clean edge suitable for screen printing.
